summary: Tested 3 homepage refinements: ConsequenceNumberBlock, FourPillarsSection updates, and RecoveryPathBlock rewrite. All features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 refinements verified: (1) ConsequenceNumberBlock renders between AuthorityClock and AutoMethod with correct $15K-$30K (red) vs $5K (gold) values. (2) FourPillarsSection H2 = 'Four Pillar Standard', all 4 pillar cards have 'Without it:' text. (3) RecoveryPathBlock has H2 'The Recovery Path', LP-STD-002 label, two-column INSTALLATION/RECOVERY cards, correct href links, and closing line. No JS errors.
